Video.summary: We're doing a multi-stage 212 CC go-kart engine build to show how to have fun on a budget.
Video.title: Single Cylinder Special

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: Is the C5 Corvette Z06 the ultimate bang for your buck track and street car, or is there room for improvement?
Video.title: C5 Z06 Bolt on Power

Video.summary: Adding more Stop and Go to our C5 Corvette Z06 for the track.
Video.title: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Image.alt: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Video.summary: We're fitting our 509 cubic inch Big Block into its new 1956 Chevrolet 210 home.
Video.title: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Video.summary: We continue on a 1969 Firebird, taking off the rusty sub-frame and modifying the Impala, known as 'Red Sled'.
Video.title: Red Sled Sheet Metal

Video.summary: We tackle rust and lead filler removal on the 1961 Impala, restoring its trunk and body panels.
Video.title: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Image.alt: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Video.summary: We revamp a classic Impala with a 409 engine and hit the Year One Experience for muscle car fun.
Video.title: Red Sled gets a 409

Video.summary: Rick and Tommy finish Red Sled's steering, clutch and Air Ride systems. Learn how to rebuild a starter.
Video.title: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Image.alt: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Video.summary: Red Sled is finished. Look back at the entire build, and ride along on her maiden voyage.
Video.title: Red Sled Hits the Road

Video.summary: We dyno test a custom-built 5.3 LS crate engine and talk in-depth about the importance of quality fasteners.
Video.title: Crate Horsepower

Video.summary: How-to man-up a Jeep Wrangler by plucking out the anemic 3.8L V6 and replacing it with a late model Hemi V8.
Video.title: Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap

Image.alt: Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap
Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap
Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap

Video.summary: Tech details on completing a Jeep Hemi engine swap.
Video.title: Hemi JK: V8 Swap Completion

Video.summary: How-to lift our Hemi Jeep with mid-arm suspension and a Dana 44 front diff for more articulation and grip.
Video.title: Hemi JK: Mid-Arm Articulation

Video.summary: We complete our V8 Hemi Wrangler project making it trail ready.
Video.title: Hemi JK: Rock Ready

Video.summary: Hemi Jeep gets Dana 44s with air lockers then a payoff in the rough with off-road suspension designer Rusty Me
Video.title: Hemi JK: Payoff

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: It's the start of our all new MuscleTrux series and to kick it off, Ford versus Chevy.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 1

Video.summary: Bowtie boy Ryan's got a big play for using big displacement to make big power for his entry.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 2: 1990 Chevrolet 454 SS

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: It's Blue Oval boy Kevin's turn to take over the shop.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 3: 1994 Ford Lightning

Video.summary: It's another shot in our MuscleTrux series as Kevin's 1994 Ford Lightning prepares for battle.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 4

Video.summary: Ryan returns fire as his 1990 Chevy 454 SS also gets dropped down into the weeds.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 5

Video.summary: It's a chassis dyno shootout to see what kind of power our sport trucks are making.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 6

Video.summary: It's finally time to lay it on the line as we put the two trucks in head to head competition.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 7

Video.summary: A good find: Marc and Tommy go on the hunt for a certain top-shelf Mopar.
Video.title: Hard Charger

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Dodge Charger needs some sheet metal replaced.
Video.title: Hard Charger: Heavy Metal

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew cuts a rusty old floor out of a '69 Dodge Charger and replace it.
Video.title: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Image.alt: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Video.summary: The time has come to paint Project Hard Charger.
Video.title: Hard Charger…or Midnight Rider?

Video.summary: Work continues on a 1969 Dodge Charger to adapt a Hellcat drivetrain to work in it; Tommy visits OPGI.
Video.title: Hard Charger – Hellcrate Install

Video.summary: The ’69 Dodge Charger gets a new custom exhaust to go with that Hellcrate Engine.
Video.title: Exhausted Hard Charger!

Video.summary: Tommy puts the finishing touches on Project Hard Charger's hood.
Video.title: Charger Hood and Interior

Video.summary: We take Hard Charger to the Mopar Nationals in Ohio to give it a final shakedown.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Hits the Street

Video.summary: We head to Dallas for the Mecum Auction and run our Hellcat powered Charger across the block.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Goes to Mecum

Video.summary: We built a stock-looking pump-gas 534 BBC sleeper with big torque and power, swap-ready and dyno-tested.
Video.title: Sleeper 534 Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: We introduce our '89 Blazer with a raucous trail ride to show capabilities of Chevy's full size 4x4.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Introduction & Teardown

Video.summary: The Blazer gets stripped to bare metal and our SuperMax Silverado is treated to front suspension upgrades.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Image.alt: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Video.summary: We take a 3 decade old military M530C fire truck, gut it, and turn it into a bobbed deuce.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part I

Video.summary: Our military deuce is turned into a customized 4x4 truck with improved suspension and load capacity.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part II
